name: Payday Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix, 2/3 cup melted oleo, and 1 egg to form dough.
2. Press the dough into a greased 10 X 15 pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
4. Top with the bag of marshmallows and bake an additional 5-7 minutes or until set; let cool.
5. Heat the Karo, 1/4 cup oleo, vanilla, and peanut butter chips in a saucepan until melted.
6. Stir until the mixture is thick and smooth.
7. Pour over the cooled marshmallows.
8. Top with one cup of salted peanuts.
9. Refrigerate before cutting into bars.
